parts.text: Hello! Can you give me a list of 10 cookie recipes, just their name and description

transformerParameters.answer: {\"recipes\":[{\"name\":\"Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies\",\"description\":\"Soft-centered, chewy cookies loaded with melted semisweet chocolate chips and vanilla.\"},{\"name\":\"Snickerdoodles\",\"description\":\"Chewy cookies rolled in cinnamon sugar, with a slight tang from cream of tartar.\"},{\"name\":\"Peanut Butter Cookies\",\"description\":\"Rich, fudgy peanut butter cookies with crisp fork-pressed ridges.\"},{\"name\":\"Oatmeal Raisin Cookies\",\"description\":\"Hearty, chewy cookies with oats, cinnamon, and sweet raisins.\"},{\"name\":\"White Chocolate Macadamia Nut Cookies\",\"description\":\"Crunchy edges and chewy centers studded with white chocolate chunks and macadamias.\"},{\"name\":\"Chocolate Thumbprint Cookies\",\"description\":\"Buttery cookies with a well of chocolate ganache or jam in the center.\"},{\"name\":\"Lemon Sugar Cookies\",\"description\":\"Soft, lemony cookies with bright zest and a delicate sugary crust.\"},{\"name\":\"Ginger Molasses Cookies\",\"description\":\"Thick, chewy cookies loaded with ginger, cinnamon, and rich molasses.\"},{\"name\":\"Coconut Macaroons\",\"description\":\"Sweet, chewy coconut cookies with toasty edges, often dipped in chocolate.\"},{\"name\":\"Almond Biscotti\",\"description\":\"Twice-baked, crisp almond cookies perfect for dipping into coffee or tea.\"}]}
